title: NADE Top Issues for 2024
description: NADE's 2024 legislative and policy priorities for the Disability Determination Services (DDS) program, presented as a bulleted advocacy agenda. Items include recruitment and retention (staffing, hiring-authority flexibility, telework, competitive salaries), training funding, claimant communication (email/text, document upload, secure messaging), evaluation of vocational regulations and the occupational database, customer-service improvements, IT modernization (IMAGEN, Electronic Records Express replacement), CDI unit expansion, re-examination of the Medical Improvement Review Standard (MIRS), CDR program-integrity funding, timely revision of the Listings of Impairments, and enhancements to the National Case Processing System (NCPS). Scraped from the official NADE site.
notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's 'Top Issues for 2024' page (source URL preserved). temporal_coverage set to 2024 per the page title. Bulleted policy agenda; no tabular data. Acronyms referenced: DDS, OQR, ALJ, CDI, MIRS, CPD, CDR, NCPS, IMAGEN, ERE, VOIP.
